entities.name: TRICHODERMA
entities.description: A genus of fungi including species T. viride, T. hamatum, T. harzianum, T. aureoviride, and T. longibrachiatum used for biocontrol.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes infection in groundnuts.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop targeted for protection against A. flavus infection.

entities.name: BIOCONTROL
entities.description: The use of biological agents to control pests or pathogens.

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The pathological state caused by Aspergillus flavus in groundnuts.
